content: Embed SDK allows you to embed the whole {{productName}} or its part into your web interface. Select ready-to-use modes with the pre-defined parameters or a custom one to configure it manually. To learn more about SDK, refer to the

comment.text: This text serves as a descriptive introduction for the Javascript SDK section within the Portal Settings' Developer Tools. It explains how the Embed SDK can be integrated into a web interface using pre-defined or custom parameters and concludes by directing the user to further documentation.
